narration_cues.success: A blunt heft of oak, balanced for a swing.
narration_cues.failure: The grain splits and the haft snaps in two.

narration_cues.success: A keen stone point lashed firm to a straight shaft.
narration_cues.failure: The binding slips and the point clatters loose.

narration_cues.success: A wicked sliver of bone, ground to a pale edge.
narration_cues.failure: The bone shears along an old crack.

narration_cues.success: The limbs flex true and the string sings on release.
narration_cues.failure: The wood checks under tension and refuses the bend.

narration_cues.success: A clean iron blade, balanced from tang to tip.
narration_cues.failure: The blade warps in the quench and rings dead.

narration_cues.exceptional: The steel takes an edge that whispers through the air.
narration_cues.success: A fine longsword, the grip wrapped tight and true.
narration_cues.partial: Serviceable, but the temper ran uneven along the spine.
narration_cues.failure: The folded steel delaminates and the billet is ruined.

narration_cues.exceptional: The purified core seats with a chime and the blade drinks the light.
narration_cues.success: A longsword that hums against the Hollow, edge flickering radiant.
narration_cues.partial: It holds the blessing, but the binding leaves a faint cold spot.
narration_cues.failure: The core destabilizes and shatters, taking the blade with it.

narration_cues.exceptional: The named fragment speaks once, and the blade answers with its own name.
narration_cues.success: A greatblade veined with light, anti-Hollow to its core.
narration_cues.partial: Mighty, yet the Veil shard's song wavers at the edges.
narration_cues.failure: The fragment's name unmakes the work in a soundless flash.

narration_cues.success: A slender blade that flexes and snaps back like a struck wire.
narration_cues.failure: The thin steel takes a set and never springs true again.

narration_cues.success: A brutal iron head seated dead-solid on a hardwood haft.
narration_cues.failure: The head works loose on the first test swing.

narration_cues.success: A smooth oak stave, balanced to spin in either hand.
narration_cues.failure: A hidden knot splinters under the draw-knife.

narration_cues.success: It rests on a fingertip at the guard — perfectly weighted.
narration_cues.failure: The point is true but the balance sits all wrong.

narration_cues.success: A short, honest blade, quick out of the sheath.
narration_cues.failure: The tang is set crooked and the grip rattles.

narration_cues.exceptional: The fanged edge bites the air with a low predatory hiss.
narration_cues.success: Wyrm teeth set in steel, serrated and cruel.
narration_cues.partial: One tooth seats poorly and threatens to crack loose.
narration_cues.failure: The teeth shatter against the steel and scatter.

narration_cues.success: Layered and quilted, soft but stubborn against a blow.
narration_cues.failure: The stitching pulls loose and the padding sags.

narration_cues.success: Cured hides lapped and laced into a supple shell.
narration_cues.failure: The hide cures stiff and cracks at the shoulders.

narration_cues.success: Iron studs march in neat rows across hardened leather.
narration_cues.failure: The rivets tear through and leave ragged holes.

narration_cues.exceptional: Every link closed flush — it pours like water over the arm.
narration_cues.success: A shirt of riveted rings, supple and whispering.
narration_cues.partial: A few links sit open and snag against themselves.
narration_cues.failure: The weave fails and the shirt comes apart in the hands.

narration_cues.exceptional: The scales lie like a single skin, chiming softly with each step.
narration_cues.success: Overlapping scales laced to a sturdy backing.
narration_cues.partial: A row sits proud and catches on the buckles.
narration_cues.failure: The scales crack along their grain and flake away.

narration_cues.exceptional: The carapace seams fall silent — the Hollow finds no purchase.
narration_cues.success: Plated steel warded with purified carapace, cool to the touch.
narration_cues.partial: It wards well, but one seam still whispers in the dark.
narration_cues.failure: The carapace rejects the blessing and crumbles to grit.

narration_cues.exceptional: It moves like a second skin, the divine inlay catching every torch.
narration_cues.success: Full plate, articulated and proof against the heaviest blow.
narration_cues.partial: Magnificent, but a joint binds at the worst angle.
narration_cues.failure: A plate cracks in the final temper and the suit is scrap.

narration_cues.success: A round oak buckler, light on the forearm.
narration_cues.failure: The planks won't seat and the face splits.

narration_cues.success: A banded iron shield, the boss riveted dead-center.
narration_cues.failure: The boss caves on the first hard knock.

narration_cues.success: Double-banded and rimmed in iron — it shrugs off the heaviest swing.
narration_cues.failure: The reinforcing band buckles and warps the face.

narration_cues.success: A heavy weather-cloak that sheds rain and wind alike.
narration_cues.failure: The seams gape and the cloak hangs lopsided.

narration_cues.exceptional: The silk drinks the warding dust and shimmers with a faint blue ward.
narration_cues.success: Silken robes woven through with a steady protective hum.
narration_cues.partial: The ward holds, but it flickers when the wearer turns fast.
narration_cues.failure: The dust burns out the silk in a puff of acrid smoke.

narration_cues.success: A green paste that cools the skin and closes small wounds.
narration_cues.failure: The herbs scorch and the salve turns rancid.

narration_cues.success: A warm mash bound in cloth, drawing the ache from a wound.
narration_cues.failure: The bundle molds before it sets and must be thrown out.

narration_cues.success: A clear draught that neutralizes the venom it was milked from.
narration_cues.failure: The mixture curdles and keeps the poison's bite.

narration_cues.success: A ruby draught that knits flesh with a spreading warmth.
narration_cues.failure: The brew separates into a grey, inert sludge.

narration_cues.exceptional: It glows like a coal — a single sip slams the heart back to full.
narration_cues.success: A deep crimson tonic that closes even grievous wounds.
narration_cues.partial: Potent, but it leaves a lingering, bitter chill.
narration_cues.failure: The heart spoils the brew and it boils over, wasted.

narration_cues.success: An oily smear that numbs the fingertips just to handle.
narration_cues.failure: The venom denatures and the coating runs harmless.

narration_cues.success: A sealed flask of amber liquid that smokes against the glass.
narration_cues.failure: It ignites on the bench and gutters out in scorched ruin.

narration_cues.success: Three vials that catch the light and warm the palm.
narration_cues.failure: The blessing won't take and the water stays plain.

narration_cues.exceptional: The shard's wrong-note falls perfectly silent in the vial.
narration_cues.success: A draught that quiets the Veil's tremor for a precious hour.
narration_cues.partial: It steadies the resonance but leaves the ears ringing.
narration_cues.failure: The shard's song spikes and cracks the flask.

narration_cues.exceptional: It crackles with thunderbird fire — wounds close as you watch.
narration_cues.success: A radiant tonic that hauls a body back from death's edge.
narration_cues.partial: It heals, but the thunderbird oil leaves the veins buzzing.
narration_cues.failure: The oil flashes and the whole brew boils to nothing.

narration_cues.success: A warm bitter draught that steadies the hand and quiets fear.
narration_cues.failure: The sageroot oversteeps and the brew turns to a sour mud.

narration_cues.exceptional: One drop on the tongue and the worst venom unclenches its grip.
narration_cues.success: A pale tonic that purges even a wyrm's poison.
narration_cues.partial: It works, but slowly, and the patient sweats it out hard.
narration_cues.failure: The reagent fights the cure and the dose turns toxic.

narration_cues.success: Ten straight shafts, fletched and nocked, ready for the quiver.
narration_cues.failure: The shafts warp as they dry and fly crooked.

narration_cues.success: Iron-tipped and true — they group tight at fifty paces.
narration_cues.failure: The heads seat loose and rattle off the shaft.

narration_cues.success: Squat iron-headed bolts, heavy and mean.
narration_cues.failure: The short shafts split when the heads are pressed in.

narration_cues.exceptional: The heads glow faint gold — they sing toward the Hollow.
narration_cues.success: Five arrows anointed and warm, eager against the dark.
narration_cues.partial: The blessing takes unevenly; some heads stay dull.
narration_cues.failure: The oil burns the fletching and the arrows char.

narration_cues.exceptional: The purified shard binds clean — the coating bites Hollow flesh like acid.
narration_cues.success: A dark oil that any blade can wear against the corrupted.
narration_cues.partial: It works for a swing or two before the potency fades.
narration_cues.failure: The shard's taint flares and the oil eats through its own vial.

narration_cues.success: A wax-sealed ball that bursts into a choking grey cloud.
narration_cues.failure: It fizzes and dies, coughing out a thin useless wisp.

narration_cues.exceptional: The charges seat flush — they crack like thunder on impact.
narration_cues.success: Hollow-headed bolts packed with a volatile charge.
narration_cues.partial: One in three is a dud, but the rest go off well enough.
narration_cues.failure: A charge cooks off on the bench and ruins the lot.

narration_cues.success: Fat-soaked heads that catch fast and fly trailing flame.
narration_cues.failure: The wadding won't hold the oil and the heads sputter out.

narration_cues.success: A pouch of smooth-knapped stones, each one a killing weight.
narration_cues.failure: They knap jagged and tumble wild from the sling.

narration_cues.success: Pitch-soaked brands that burn slow and bright for hours.
narration_cues.failure: The fat smokes black and the torch gutters out fast.

narration_cues.success: Fifty feet of tight-laid rope that creaks and holds.
narration_cues.failure: The lay slips and the rope unravels under any real load.

narration_cues.success: A neat roll of tension wrenches and rakes, springy and fine.
narration_cues.failure: The picks come out too soft and bend at the first lock.

narration_cues.success: A hidden loop that whips taut at the lightest touch.
narration_cues.failure: The trigger sets too stiff and never springs.

narration_cues.exceptional: The spikes drop on a hair-trigger, silent until they bite.
narration_cues.success: A bed of iron spikes set under a false floor panel.
narration_cues.partial: It triggers, but a beat too slow to catch the quick.
narration_cues.failure: The mechanism jams half-sprung and sits there useless.

narration_cues.exceptional: It folds shut to a satchel and unfolds to a full laboratory in moments.
narration_cues.success: A leather case of nested vials and tools — a Laboratory you can carry.
narration_cues.partial: Functional, but a tray sticks and the burner runs cold.
narration_cues.failure: The gemstone focus cracks and the kit is so much scrap.

narration_cues.exceptional: The anchor hums a steady note — the Veil lies smooth around it.
narration_cues.success: A palm-sized ward stone that quiets the Hollow nearby.
narration_cues.partial: It wards a small room, but flickers at the edges.
narration_cues.failure: The residue destabilizes and the stone goes inert and cold.

narration_cues.exceptional: It anchors the Veil over a whole settlement — the Hollow simply cannot enter.
narration_cues.success: A great warding stone that holds the corruption at bay for miles.
narration_cues.partial: It holds, but the named fragment's whisper never fully stills.
narration_cues.failure: The fragment and the shard war, and the anchor detonates inward.

narration_cues.exceptional: The shard sets clean and the stone glows with a steady ward.
narration_cues.success: A bound stone that turns aside the lesser Hollow.
narration_cues.partial: It wards, but the shard leaves a faint, watchful cold.
narration_cues.failure: The shard's taint floods the iron and the stone cracks.

narration_cues.success: Pitons, rope, and a harness — everything to take a cliff.
narration_cues.failure: The pitons bend soft and won't bite the rock.

narration_cues.success: A fitted satchel of poultices and tools, everything to hand.
narration_cues.failure: The compartments tear and the supplies spill loose.

narration_cues.success: A tight-sewn skin that holds water without a weep.
narration_cues.failure: The seam leaks and the skin sweats dark within the hour.

narration_cues.success: The edge whispers off the stone, keen enough to part a hair.
narration_cues.failure: A heavy stroke rolls the edge and dulls it worse than before.

narration_cues.success: Banded and braced, the gear will take a beating it couldn't before.
narration_cues.failure: The reinforcing seam stresses the piece and weakens it.

narration_cues.exceptional: The dust sinks in clean and the item wakes with a soft glow.
narration_cues.success: A faint, steady enchantment settles into the gear.
narration_cues.partial: The charm takes, but it sputters when leaned on hard.
narration_cues.failure: The dust burns out and leaves a scorched, dead mark.

narration_cues.exceptional: Lightning races the blade's length and refuses to fade.
narration_cues.success: The weapon crackles, wreathed in caged elemental fury.
narration_cues.partial: The infusion holds, but arcs wild at the worst moments.
narration_cues.failure: The crystal discharges all at once and the bench blackens.

narration_cues.exceptional: The blade hungers visibly toward the Hollow, edge limned in light.
narration_cues.success: A weapon blessed to bite deep into corrupted flesh.
narration_cues.partial: The bane takes, but it only wakes near true corruption.
narration_cues.failure: The core's taint overwhelms the oil and fouls the weapon.

narration_cues.exceptional: The armor swallows the Veil's song whole — utter, blessed quiet.
narration_cues.success: Armor warded to blunt the maddening resonance of the Hollow.
narration_cues.partial: It dampens the worst of it, but a hum bleeds through.
narration_cues.failure: The shard's song spikes through the divine ward and shatters it.

narration_cues.exceptional: The fragment names the item, and it becomes legend in the hand.
narration_cues.success: A profound enchantment that reshapes the item's very nature.
narration_cues.partial: The power takes, but the named fragment exacts a subtle cost.
narration_cues.failure: The fragment's name consumes the item in a soundless white flare.

narration_cues.success: Re-gripped and re-weighted, the weapon falls into the hand like it was born there.
narration_cues.failure: The new wrap throws the balance off worse than before.

narration_cues.success: A waxy coat that hisses and shrugs off open flame.
narration_cues.failure: The coating cracks in the heat and peels away in flakes.

narration_cues.success: The silk-wrapped grip never slips, even slick with rain or blood.
narration_cues.failure: The silk frays loose and the wrap sloughs off in a day.

narration_cues.exceptional: Vast and perfectly balanced, it cuts the air with a low moan.
narration_cues.success: A two-handed blade of folded steel, heavy and grim.
narration_cues.partial: Mighty, but a touch blade-heavy at the tip.
narration_cues.failure: The long billet cracks down its length in the quench.

narration_cues.success: A blunt iron head on a long haft, made to break shields.
narration_cues.failure: The haft cracks under the head's weight on the first swing.

narration_cues.success: Salted, smoked, and wrapped tight — good for a week on the trail.
narration_cues.failure: The cure doesn't take and the rations turn before nightfall.

narration_cues.success: Three forged flukes on a long rope — it bites and holds.
narration_cues.failure: A fluke straightens under load and the hook tears free.

narration_cues.exceptional: The blessed oil takes hold and the blade chimes whenever the Hollow draws near.
narration_cues.success: An Ashmark longsword, radiant-edged and humming against corruption.
narration_cues.partial: It holds the blessing, but the chime comes a beat late.
narration_cues.failure: The purified core flares and cracks the steel down its length.

narration_cues.exceptional: The living wood knits seamlessly; the shield grows a hand's breadth stronger in natural terrain.
narration_cues.success: A Thornveld shield that creaks and settles as if still growing.
narration_cues.partial: It guards true, but the purified heartwood leaves a soft dead patch.
narration_cues.failure: The corruption was not fully burned out and the wood splits, weeping black.

narration_cues.exceptional: The cloak moves as if always in wind; the wearer barely touches the ground.
narration_cues.success: A steppe cloak that lifts and ripples with no breeze at all.
narration_cues.partial: It carries the wind, but tugs hard the wrong way at times.
narration_cues.failure: The razorwing feathers shear loose and scatter on the floor.

narration_cues.exceptional: The lens seats perfectly; the invisible world snaps into focus through it.
narration_cues.success: A silver-set monocle that shows what the eye cannot.
narration_cues.partial: It reveals the unseen, but the edges swim and blur.
narration_cues.failure: The Veil shard clouds black and the lens is blind.

narration_cues.exceptional: The residue threads cleanly into the iron; the ring drinks Resonance without strain.
narration_cues.success: A plain iron ring, warm, that quiets a caster's overreach.
narration_cues.partial: It dampens, but warms uncomfortably with every spell.
narration_cues.failure: The spatial residue destabilizes and the ring cracks in the quenching.

narration_cues.exceptional: The void fragment dissolves into a shimmer that holds incorporeal form a full minute.
narration_cues.success: An iridescent draught that smells of ozone and lets the drinker walk through walls.
narration_cues.partial: It works, but the incorporeal state flickers in and out.
narration_cues.failure: The fragment unravels in the flask and the brew evaporates to nothing.

narration_cues.exceptional: The living stone settles into a blade that reshapes the battlefield at a thought.
narration_cues.success: A weapon of living stone that slowly changes shape between fights.
narration_cues.partial: It cuts and reshapes, but the form never quite stops shifting.
narration_cues.failure: The named fragment and the stone refuse each other and the blade crumbles to gravel.

narration_cues.exceptional: The trapped note settles into the crystal; the amulet can swallow all sound at will.
narration_cues.success: A crystal pendant holding one perfect, silent note.
narration_cues.partial: It silences, but a faint music leaks through when the wearer is alone.
narration_cues.failure: The note escapes the crystal in a shriek and the pendant shatters.

narration_cues.exceptional: The shard is bound without waking the paradise; the ring soothes without ever lying.
narration_cues.success: A warm ring carved from the Still's false paradise; calm radiates from it.
narration_cues.partial: It calms allies, but whispers its offer of rest more often than it should.
narration_cues.failure: The paradise stirs in the shard and pulls the crafter into a daylong trance.
